commands:
sudo -u ec2-user bash -c 'cat > /tmp/eta.py <<PYEOF
import json, glob, os, datetime
root = "/home/ec2-user/platform/data/smoker-shard-a"
os.chdir(root)
files = sorted(glob.glob("*/cases/*.json"), key=os.path.getmtime)
if not files:
    print("no cases yet")
else:
    # Get start time from run-state.json
    rs = glob.glob("*/run-state.json")[0]
    start = json.load(open(rs))["startedAt"]
    # Wall clock
    first_m = os.path.getmtime(files[0])
    last_m = os.path.getmtime(files[-1])
    wall_s = last_m - first_m
    n = len(files)
    rate = n / wall_s if wall_s > 0 else 0
    target = 1122
    remaining_s = (target - n) / rate if rate > 0 else 0
    print(f"Shard A: {n}/{target} cases")
    print(f"Wall clock (first-to-last): {wall_s/60:.1f} min")
    print(f"Rate: {rate*60:.2f} cases/min = {60/rate:.1f}s/case")
    print(f"Remaining: {remaining_s/3600:.1f} hours (~{(first_m + target/rate)})")
    print(f"Started: {start}")
    eta = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(last_m + remaining_s).strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC")
    print(f"ETA: {eta}")
PYEOF
python3.11 /tmp/eta.py'
